description: Clodura is an AI lead generation platform with a B2B contact database, email verification, buyer intent, and a built-in dialer.
overview: Clodura is a go-to-market platform for B2B sales teams that finds accurate contacts across 50+ data sources and combines database access, email verification, AI outreach, and calling in one place.
what_is: Clodura.AI is a go-to-market platform built for B2B sales teams. It finds accurate contacts and enriches data from more than 50 sources, and combines database access, email verification, AI outreach, and integrated calling in a single system.

It is strongest for lead generation, email verification, and outreach, with real-time buyer intent signals and automated sequences that speed up prospecting. Clodura fits into a GTM stack as a data, enrichment, and sales engagement tool rather than a full marketing automation or analytics suite.
